inputs.label: Cooling Load (Total Heat Gain)
inputs.businessContext: Total heat gain from building envelope, occupants, equipment, and infiltration. Based on ASHRAE Handbook of Fundamentals.

inputs.label: Sensible Heat Ratio (SHR)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of sensible to total heat gain. Typical range 0.7-0.8 for comfort cooling. ASHRAE Standard 55.

inputs.label: Design Temperature Difference (ΔT)
inputs.businessContext: Difference between indoor and outdoor design temperatures. ASHRAE 90.1 climate zone data.

inputs.label: Airflow Rate (CFM)
inputs.businessContext: Required airflow for cooling. Typically 400 CFM per ton. ASHRAE 62.1 ventilation standard.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Performance (COP)
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of cooling equipment. Minimum COP per ASHRAE 90.1. Typical range 3-4 for air-cooled chillers.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Full-load equivalent operating hours. Based on climate zone and building type. ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G.

inputs.label: Electricity Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity. Varies by region and utility. EIA data.

inputs.label: System Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of HVAC system. Affects efficiency and maintenance. ASHRAE Handbook HVAC Systems.

inputs.label: Maintenance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Degradation factor due to fouling, refrigerant charge, etc. Typical 0.9-1.0. ASHRAE Guideline 14.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs.

rules: if systemType == 'water-cooled' then efficiencyCOP >= 4.0 else efficiencyCOP >= 3.0

thresholds.sensibleHeatRatio: if sensibleHeatRatio < 0.7 then 'Low SHR may indicate dehumidification issues'
thresholds.efficiencyCOP: if efficiencyCOP < 3.0 then 'Low COP; consider equipment upgrade'
thresholds.maintenanceFactor: if maintenanceFactor < 0.85 then 'Poor maintenance; schedule service'

formulas.dataConfidenceFactor: if dataConfidence == 'low' then 0.8 else if dataConfidence == 'medium' then 0.95 else 1.0

hiddenLossDrivers: if sensibleHeatRatio < 0.7 then 'Low SHR: dehumidification load high'
if efficiencyCOP < 3.0 then 'Low COP: energy waste'
if maintenanceFactor < 0.85 then 'Poor maintenance: performance degradation'
suggestedActions: if airflowRate < requiredAirflow then 'Increase airflow or reduce duct pressure drop'
if efficiencyCOP < 3.0 then 'Consider upgrading to high-efficiency equipment'
if maintenanceFactor < 0.85 then 'Schedule preventive maintenance: clean coils, check refrigerant'
if sensibleHeatRatio < 0.7 then 'Evaluate dehumidification strategy: reheat or dedicated dehumidifier'
